131.reason: [This printf is inside the for-loop, causing a newline after each connected component. But the problem states the graph remains connected after deletion, and traversal must start from 0 only. So it should print only one sequence per call, not per unvisited node. Also, since the graph is connected and we start from 0 (which is never deleted), the loop should only run once (for i=0). However, because the loop iterates over all i and calls BFS on every unvisited node, and then prints a newline each time, it produces extra newlines or multiple lines when it should output exactly one line per traversal.]
